description: Build branded admin hub with Discovery Spark, gradient header, tabs, version badge, and purple admin sidebar styling. Implements all ZYMARG ecosystem branding standards for the admin area.
steps: Create new file zymarg-community-board/includes/class-zcrb-admin-hub.php: Build a branded admin hub page registered as the TOP-LEVEL menu page (replacing the default CPT menu position). The hub should have: (1) A gradient header bar using linear-gradient(to right, #9500A5, #FEA9FF) with white wordmark text 'ZYMARG Community Board' and version badge 'v{VERSION}' in the top-right corner. (2) The canonical Discovery Spark SVG animation inside the hub panel (NOT as the WP admin menu icon - menu icon stays as a standard dashicon). Discovery Spark paths: purple paths use #6833ea, gold paths use #FFD166, fast sequential pulse animation on purple paths only, gold is static. (3) Tab navigation: Dashboard (overview/stats), All Requests (link to CPT list), Settings (embed or link to existing settings page). The hub is the landing page when clicking 'Community Board' in the admin sidebar.

Update zymarg-community-board/includes/class-zcrb-cpt.php: Change 'show_in_menu' from true to the admin hub slug so the CPT appears as a submenu item under the hub. Keep menu_icon as 'dashicons-megaphone' for the top-level menu.

Add admin sidebar purple text styling: In the admin hub class or the bootstrap file, add an admin_head action that outputs inline CSS to style the Community Board admin menu item text with color #9500A5 and font-weight 600. On hover/focus/active (current menu), text should be white. Target: #adminmenu .toplevel_page_zcrb-hub .wp-menu-name
Update zymarg-community-board/includes/class-zcrb-settings.php: Change add_menu() to register settings as a submenu under the hub page instead of under the CPT menu.
Update zymarg-community-board/zymarg-community-board.php: Add require_once for class-zcrb-admin-hub.php. Instantiate ZCRB_Admin_Hub in the plugins_loaded callback.

Add admin CSS: Create zymarg-community-board/assets/css/zcrb-admin.css with styles for the hub page header (gradient), Discovery Spark animation, tab navigation, version badge, and responsive layout. Enqueue this CSS only on admin pages belonging to the plugin.
acceptance_criteria: Admin menu shows 'Community Board' with dashicons-megaphone icon and purple #9500A5 text (font-weight 600)
Admin menu text turns white on hover/active states
Hub page has gradient header with signature gradient (to right, #9500A5, #FEA9FF)
Version badge shows in top-right of hub header
Discovery Spark SVG with correct colors (#6833ea purple paths, #FFD166 gold) and pulse animation appears inside the hub panel
Tab navigation provides access to Dashboard, All Requests, and Settings
Settings page is accessible as a submenu under the hub
CPT list table is accessible as a submenu under the hub
All PHP files pass syntax check
findings: All acceptance criteria met. Admin hub registered as top-level menu with dashicons-megaphone. CPT nested under hub via show_in_menu='zcrb-hub'. Settings submenu registered under hub. Brand CSS updated to target .toplevel_page_zcrb-hub with purple text and white hover/active. Discovery Spark SVG uses #6833ea (purple animated) and #FFD166 (gold static). Gradient header uses linear-gradient(to right, #9500A5, #FEA9FF). Also added image_max_count setting (1-4) per user steering request.
